rationale: Hard pass for Mob Control. The ASMR spice-jar hook lives in a soft pastel pink/cream palette and a calm, sensory-satisfaction emotional register that directly conflicts with the game's high-contrast purple/cyan/yellow energetic competitive tone — there's no character, no crowd, no aiming cue, and nothing that telegraphs the multiplier-gate core loop in the first 3 seconds. Audience also skews female/lifestyle ASMR viewers rather than the 18-35 male casual-strategy player, and with only 1 creative from 1 advertiser at 143d freshness there's no velocity signal worth chasing. Don't adapt.
